title: IGH Delhi Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 04 Junior Resident Posts
description: Indira Gandhi Hospital Delhi (IGH Delhi) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the 04 vacancies for Junior Resident Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the BDS can grab this chance and apply for the IGH Delhi Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
